channel.title: Drum Machines on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Drum Machines on jamesm.blog

item.title: Roland TR-8S vs MC-707
item.description:
Roland has long been a cornerstone of electronic music hardware, and two of its most popular modern devices - the TR-8S Rhythm Performer and the MC-707 Groovebox - often come up in the same conversation. While they overlap in some areas, they’re built with very different goals in mind.

This post brings together everything you need to know to decide TR-8S vs MC-707, including workflow, genres, live use, and how they can even work together. If you are interested in pairing the MC-707 with a flagship synth as the master of a hybrid rig, I cover that approach in Hybrid systems: Montage + MC-707.
